semantic.role: Documentation rendering utility for the ArchSpine view layer. Provides a static class and helper functions to produce formatted Markdown or text documentation from structured data (lists, sections, layout types).
responsibilities: Render an array of string items as a structured list (e.g., Markdown bullet or numbered list).
Render an array of section strings into a single block by joining with separators.
Provide a static DocumentationRenderer.render() method that takes a LayoutType and generates the appropriate documentation output.
Define the LayoutType union type for categorizing rendering contexts (source, document, config, folder, project).
outOfScope: No MCP tool or resource definitions.
No file system scanning or analysis.
No external I/O beyond utility imports (fs, path) which are used for path resolution only.
invariants: Exports are stable utility functions and a class with a static method.
Does not depend on runtime state or configuration.
Dependencies limited to Node.js built-in modules and internal protocol types.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, stateless rendering layer for documentation output across different layout types.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 release – part of architectural governance and semantic layer consolidation.

publicSurface.description: Takes an array of strings and joins them into a structured list format (e.g., each item on a new line). Used by documentation producers to render enumerations.
Takes an array of section strings and joins them into a single block, filtering empty entries. Used to append additional sections to documentation output.
Class with a static `render(type: LayoutType, ...?)` method that generates the complete documentation text for a given layout type. Called by view producers and renderers.
Union type alias defining valid layout categories: 'source', 'document', 'config', 'folder', 'project'. Used to discriminate rendering behavior.
